title: Short title
doc_html:
§702.  Short title

 This Chapter shall be known as and cited as the Louisiana Savings and Loan Association Law.

 Acts 1983, No. 675, §1.

§702.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known as and cited as the Louisiana Savings and Loan Association Law.
Acts 1983, No. 675, §1.
